overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a slow exploration of an elevated pedestrian walkway and courtyard at night. The scene features prominent neon lighting, a distinctive cylindrical tower with colorful horizontal stripes, and transitions between open city views and enclosed patio spaces. The camera moves smoothly through the futuristic urban environment with no other characters present.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with neon city views

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along an elevated balcony, observing the colorful neon tower and cityscape

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building with horizontal neon stripes in rainbow colors
transparent safety barrier along the balcony edge
large planters with green foliage lining the walkway
illuminated commercial signs and building facades in the distance
high-rise structures with lit windows forming the city skyline

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated walkway at night, with a striking cylindrical tower featuring rainbow neon stripes dominating the right side of the frame. The camera moves slowly forward along the tiled balcony, passing potted plants and glass railings, with the illuminated cityscape visible in the background.

events.description: turns left from open balcony into enclosed courtyard area
ambient lighting shifts to darker tones with purple accent light under table

agents.ego_description: turning left into a private courtyard and approaching a table with glowing purple lighting

entered.detail: round metal table with items on surface
two chairs with blue seats positioned at the table
illuminated base under the table casting purple light on ground
large metal doors with diagonal bracing patterns
rectangular white planters with dense green foliage
metal grating and beams forming an overhead structure

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left into a more enclosed courtyard space, leaving the city view behind. A table with two chairs and a distinctive purple glowing light underneath becomes the focal point. The area features industrial metal architecture overhead and large planters against the walls, creating an intimate patio atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: balcony edge with tropical vegetation overlooking lower levels

events.description: exits courtyard interior back to outer balcony edge with vegetation
camera pans to reveal view of lower levels below the balcony

agents.ego_description: circling around the courtyard and moving back toward the outer edge with large leafy plants

entered.detail: tropical plants with broad leaves in white rectangular planters
concrete wall with white painted markings and tags
view down to street level below the balcony
exposed ductwork and conduits running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the courtyard and back toward the outer edge, where large tropical plants in white planters become prominent. The view opens to show a graffiti-covered wall and a look down at lower levels of the city. The industrial architecture with exposed overhead pipes frames the scene as the exploration continues along the balcony perimeter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, neon-lit elevated walkway into an intimate industrial courtyard before returning to a panoramic city view. It begins by gliding forward along a tiled balcony, passing potted plants and glass railings while a cylindrical tower with rainbow neon stripes dominates the skyline. As the camera turns left, the expansive city view recedes and the environment shifts into an enclosed patio space characterized by industrial overhead architecture and a table illuminated by a purple glow. The scene then opens back up as the camera moves through the courtyard toward the outer edge, passing large tropical plants in white planters. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal a graffiti-covered wall and a view of the city's lower levels, framed by exposed overhead pipes along the balcony perimeter.
